calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Continued To Nov-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti for Betty Kelleher.

The Court informed Counsel that its main concern is a material change in distribution, and that it requires filing of an amendment to the petition to reflect the change and the Minor receiving notice. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is continued to November 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amendment and notice.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2018 Continued To Oct-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Oct-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mazen Salfiti for petitioner Betty Kelleher.

Mr. Salfiti confirmed that petitioner was seeking appointment under a lost will, and that only one parcel of real property was to be probated. The matter was continued to , 2018 at 9:00 a.m./1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. The Court granted the petition for probate of will, subject to review of the order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti for Betty Kelleher.

The Court stated that Local Rule 14.29 requires that publication include language that a lost will is requested to be admitted. Mr. Salfiti stated that they made a good faith attempt, that there are no creditors and that the Estate has already been administered. The Court stated that this is not discretionary and that it is a rule. The Court also informed Counsel that a declaration regarding the lost will needs to be filed. The Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper publication.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Jan-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
